chunks.heading: 6.2 Thief Skill
chunks.notes: Key claims: The thief skill is taught at the thieves' guild, with guild members required to contribute 10% of their income or 500 silver coins annually. The owner of this skill is called a thief, who are specialized craftsmen familiar with techniques needed behind the scenes of society. The thief skill includes 17 abilities, such as lockpicking, stealthy step, and pickpocketing, with some having equipment restrictions or being non-retriable. Entities touched: thief skill, thieves' guild, thief, lockpicking, stealthy step, pickpocketing. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-6-2-thief-skill.

chunks.heading: 6.3 Ranger Skill

chunks.heading: 6.6 Common Adventurer Abilities
chunks.notes: Key claims: Common adventurer abilities include Riding, Swim, Ship Steering, Climb, and Long/High Jump. Climbing requires rope assistance unless the thief skill is used. Swimming requires light armor or no armor, and heavy armor can cause drowning. Falling damage is calculated as fall height x 3 minus defense roll result + adventurer level. Entities touched: Riding, Swim, Ship Steering, Climb, Long Jump, High Jump, Folklore Knowledge, Spellsongs. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-6-6-common-adventurer-abilities.

chunks.heading: 12.2 Rules for Poison, Illness and Infection
chunks.notes: Key claims: Illnesses in Sword World RPG are defined as disruptions in the balance of spirit power; progression is determined by depth, speed, intensity, and healing scores; healing can be achieved through magic or herbs. Entities touched: Common Cold, Green Slime Rot, Cotton Weaver, Stone Skin, Dance Macabre, Deep Sleep, Bat Fever, Balloon Burst, Vampire Skin, Humbaba Curse, Lycanthropy, Rat Disease, Red Cap, Lockjaw. chunks.heading: 13.2.9 Undead
chunks.notes: Key claims: Dullahan is a ghost headless knight with sword and head, riding a chariot pulled by headless horses. Undead knight is a ghost knight in rusty armor, wielding a large sword, immune to ordinary weapons. Wraith is an ethereal being separated from its physical body by ancient magic, unaffected by physical attacks. Mummy is a monster transformed by ancient ritual, weak to fire attacks. Vampires suck lifeblood and mental power, immune to normal weapons. Undead king is the ultimate undead, a powerful necromancer from the ancient kingdom, similar to vampires. Entities touched: Dullahan, Undead knight, Wraith, Mummy, Vampire, Undead king. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-13-2-9-undead-2.
